mapper.select:
select * from product where 1=1
and product_code like concat('%',#{product.productCode},'%')
and product_name like concat('%',#{product.productName},'%')
and product_type = #{product.productType}
and created_by like concat('%',#{product.createdBy},'%')
and created_time between #{product.startCreatedTime} and #{product.endCreatedTime}
order by created_time desc
select exists(select 1 from product where product_code = #{productCode})

SELECT product_code FROM product WHERE product_code IN
#{code}
select product_name as label, id as value FROM product where product_name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
select * from product where product_name like concat('%',#{productName},'%') or product_code like concat('%',#{productName},'%') limit 1
select * from product where product_name like concat('%',#{productName},'%') order by product_name
select price from product where id = #{productId}

select * from product where product_name like concat('%',#{productName},'%') or #{productName} like concat('%',product_name,'%') order by case when product_name like concat('%',#{productName},'%') then 0 else 1 end, length(product_name) desc limit 1
